item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in stitching with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest stitching adjustments that hobby leatherworkers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: saddle stitch tutorial
item.description: The persistent myths around saddle stitch tutorial, stress-tested against what hobby leatherworkers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your tools in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying tools project for hobby leatherworkers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/myog is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the finishing community this week.

item.title: The stitching checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified stitching purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of patterns
item.description: The most common early stumbles in patterns, and the cheap corrections that fix them for hobby leatherworkers.

item.title: "leather edge finishing" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about leather edge finishing through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your finishing questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the finishing questions hobby leatherworkers keep asking, minus the hedging.
